backend/main.mo: Main backend actor that manages file uploads and storage using blob-storage mixin, storing file metadata (filename, size, timestamp, contentType) and providing uploadFile, getFile, and listFiles endpoints.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: Files page with upload UI, file list display, navigation integration, and routing configuration, all with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 13 frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration files for the LAN Hub application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode color tokens for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and sidebar variants.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application from /src/main.tsx with viewport meta tags and 'LAN Hub' title.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining routes for Home (/), Dashboard, Files, Network Status, and Settings pages, all wrapped in a Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, LAN Hub branding, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper component providing consistent structure with Navigation header, main content area via Outlet, and Footer across all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with logo, app title, and menu items (Home, Dashboard, Files, Network Status, Settings) with active state highlighting based on current route.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for file operations: useListFiles fetches all files, useGetFile retrieves a specific file by ID, and useUploadFile mutation uploads files with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm earthy color scheme for light and dark modes, including colors for backgrounds, cards, buttons, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying network statistics (connected devices, bandwidth, storage, uptime), recent activity log, network overview details, and device status cards with mock data.
frontend/src/pages/Files.tsx: File management page with drag-and-drop upload functionality, progress tracking, file listing with download capabilities, using ExternalBlob for file handling and React Query hooks for backend integration.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section featuring network background image, feature cards highlighting local network benefits (security, speed, availability), and call-to-action buttons linking to dashboard and network status.
frontend/src/pages/NetworkStatus.tsx: Network monitoring page displaying real-time metrics (download/upload speed, signal strength, latency) with progress bars and a list of connected devices showing IP addresses, MAC addresses, and connection status.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component with cards for network configuration (network name, IP range, gateway, DHCP), notifications (device connections, network issues, performance alerts, system updates), security settings, and appearance preferences using shadcn/ui components.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, custom font families (Inter, JetBrains Mono), container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and animation keyframes for accordion and other UI components.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a LAN-based website with existing features including landing page, navigation menu, dashboard, file upload/download functionality, and pending backend requirements for file storage and retrieval.
